scripts.predev: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 20) { console.error('AegisAI web requires Node.js >=20. Run nvm use inside apps/web or install Node 20+. Current: '+process.version); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.prebuild: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if (major < 20) { console.error('AegisAI web requires Node.js >=20. Run nvm use inside apps/web or install Node 20+. Current: '+process.version); process.exit(1); }"
